title: centranthus calcitrapae var. clausonis
intro: Centranthus calcitrapae var. clausonis, also known as the red valerian or Jupiter's beard, is a perennial flowering plant in the valerian family. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an antispasmodic, helping to reduce muscle spasms and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of red valerian include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve sleep quality, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and menstrual cramps. Red valerian can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried flower remedies, which are commonly used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
